name: io.github.yukakust/gpu
description: Multiplayer — agent-to-agent network for teams: your coding agent (Claude Code / Codex) talks to teammates' agents (dm, who-knows-X routing, shared rooms, approval-gated file/command requests). Human-in-the-loop on every consequential action; self-join at tier=external, no shared secret.

_meta.note: Local stdio MCP installed via https://joinmultiplayer.ai/install.sh (curl|sh or download-then-run). Open client + SECURITY.md + signed CHECKSUMS in this repo. NOTE: the official MCP Registry requires a published npm/PyPI package or a remote HTTP endpoint — packaging to PyPI is the remaining step to list here.
